song.title: I Saw the Light
song.lyrics:
[V1] I’ve wandered so aimless, life filled with sin I wouldn’t let my dear Savior in Then Jesus came like a stranger in the night Praise the Lord, I saw the light
[C] I saw the light, I saw the light No more darkness, no more night Now I’m so happy, no sorrow in sight Praise the Lord, I saw the light
[V2] I’ve walked in darkness, clouds covered me I had no idea where the way out could be Then came the sunrise and rolled back the night Praise the Lord, I saw the light
[V3] Just like a blind man I wandered alone Worries and fear I claimed for my own Then like a blind man who God gave back his sight Praise the Lord, I saw the light
[V4] When death takes me down and I breathe here no more My anthem will sound on that eternal shore When I join them with the angels in heaven on high Singing, “Praise the Lord, I saw the light”
